languages.text: "Все вокруг нас постоянно повторяется — это похоже на некую странную технологию".
"Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."
languages.original_text: "Все вокруг нас постоянно повторяется — это похоже на некую странную технологию".

traits.locale_text: "Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."
"Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."
"Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."

languages.text: “我们周遭的一切都在不断重复，这与某种诡异的技术手段高度相似。”
languages.original_text: "Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."

traits.locale_text: “我们周遭的一切都在不断重复，这与某种诡异的技术手段高度相似。”

languages.text: « Tout ce qui se passe autour de nous ne cesse de se répéter. Une étrange technologie est à l'œuvre. »
languages.original_text: "Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."

traits.locale_text: « Tout ce qui se passe autour de nous ne cesse de se répéter. Une étrange technologie est à l'œuvre. »

languages.text: "Etrafımızdaki her şey kendini tekrar edip duruyor. Tuhaf bir teknolojiyi andırıyor."
languages.original_text: "Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."

traits.locale_text: "Etrafımızdaki her şey kendini tekrar edip duruyor. Tuhaf bir teknolojiyi andırıyor."

languages.text: «Todo a nuestro alrededor se repite constantemente, como si estuviera orquestado por una tecnología extraña».
languages.original_text: "Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."

traits.locale_text: «Todo a nuestro alrededor se repite constantemente, como si estuviera orquestado por una tecnología extraña».

languages.text: "Alles um uns herum wiederholt sich ... es gleicht irgendeiner seltsamen Technologie."
languages.original_text: "Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."

traits.locale_text: "Alles um uns herum wiederholt sich ... es gleicht irgendeiner seltsamen Technologie."

languages.text: 「我々の周囲のすべては繰り返される。それはまるで奇妙な技術に似ている。」
languages.original_text: "Everything around us keeps repeating itself — it is akin to some strange technology."

traits.locale_text: 「我々の周囲のすべては繰り返される。それはまるで奇妙な技術に似ている。」
